stem: Making a false or misleading statement to induce a client to buy a product is:

options.A: Allowed if sales targets are high

explanation: 虚假/误导陈述诱导交易属 FAA 下的罪行。
sourceRef: Financial Advisers Act — Conduct of Business, Powers & Offences

stem: Which best describes MAS’ powers over financial advisers?

options.B: MAS may inspect, investigate and take regulatory/enforcement action (directions, restrictions, suspension/revocation, prohibition)
options.C: MAS only issues licences and nothing else

explanation: MAS 可检查、调查并对违规采取监管/执法行动(指令/限制/暂停撤销牌照/禁业)。
sourceRef: Financial Advisers Act — Conduct of Business, Powers & Offences

stem: When recommending a product, a representative must:

options.B: Disclose material information such as risks, fees and conflicts, with a reasonable basis

explanation: 须披露风险/费用/冲突等重要信息且推荐有合理基础。
sourceRef: Financial Advisers Act — Conduct of Business, Powers & Offences
